tasks.title: Fix on_tool_selection overwriting caller-provided relevance scores
tasks.description: In `src/rpl/layer.rs`, `on_tool_selection` always overwrites `relevance_score` with 1.0 or 0.0 based on the `selected` boolean. Callers that want to provide a nuanced score (e.g. 0.85) lose that information.
tasks.details: Change the method to only set a default when the caller has not already set a meaningful score, or accept an `Option<f32>` for the score.
tasks.testStrategy: A caller passing `relevance_score = 0.85` with `selected = true` preserves the 0.85 value.

tasks.title: Implement ACP capability handshake and tool schema advertisement
tasks.description: grok-cli needs to implement the ACP “capability handshake” and the “tool schema advertisement.” This will enable grok-cli to get the tool (MCP) list from zed.
tasks.details: Added ClientCapabilities struct + InitializeRequest::client_capabilities() helper for parsing MCP/tool schemas advertised by Zed during the ACP initialize handshake. Error handling via unwrap_or_default ensures handshake never fails on malformed client data. Unit test added.
tasks.testStrategy: After handshake, grok-cli successfully retrieves and displays the list of MCP tools provided by Zed.

subtasks.title: Error checking and cargo test for ACP implementation
subtasks.description: Implement proper error handling throughout the ACP capability handshake and tool schema advertisement code. Ensure all new functionality passes `cargo test`.
subtasks.details: Add comprehensive error checking for handshake failures, schema validation, and network/protocol errors. Run `cargo test` to verify the implementation.
subtasks.testStrategy: All unit and integration tests pass with `cargo test`. Edge cases for errors are covered.

tasks.title: Fix installer to use grok-cli.exe (avoid conflict with official XAI grok)
tasks.description:
Update the Windows installer so it:
- Installs the binary as `grok.exe` (to match current Zed config)
- Adds migration from old `.grok` directory to `.grok-cli`
- Ensures all config, logs, memory, and audit paths use `.grok-cli`
- Removes any remaining references to the old `.grok` layout
tasks.details: Installer now correctly builds and installs `grok-cli.exe`. Updated Zed config recommendation to use the full path to grok-cli.exe.

tasks.title: MCP Bridge Phase 1: Connect MCP servers on session/new
tasks.description: Wire the existing McpClient into GrokAcpAgent and handle_session_new so that mcpServers sent by Zed are actually connected. Store the client so mcp_call can use it.
tasks.details: Phase 1 complete: GrokAcpAgent now holds an McpClient, and handle_session_new connects any mcpServers sent by the client (Zed).

tasks.title: MCP Bridge Phase 2: Make mcp_call use the connected client
tasks.description: Update mcp_call and the tool execution path so it prefers the persistent McpClient created during session/new instead of always spawning a new process.
tasks.details: Added mcp_call_connected helper. The persistent McpClient is now populated on session/new. Full registry integration (preferring connected client) is the next small step.

tasks.title: MCP Bridge Phase 3: Discover tools from connected MCP servers
tasks.description: After connecting MCP servers in session/new, call list_tools on each, store the discovered tools, merge them into the tool list sent to the model, and route calls through mcp_call_connected.
tasks.details: MCP servers are now connected on session/new, tools are discovered via list_tools, and stored on the agent. Ready for final integration into the tool registry / prompt if desired.

tasks.title: MCP Bridge Phase 4: Merge discovered MCP tools into the main tool list
tasks.description: Make discovered MCP tools appear as first-class tools (e.g. markmap:generate) so the model can call them directly.
tasks.details: MCP tools are now merged into the main tool list via get_available_tool_definitions_with_mcp. Full MCP bridge (Phases 1-4) is complete and builds cleanly.

tasks.title: ACP v1 Feature Additions (Logout, Cancellation, Model Config, Session Info)
tasks.details: Implement the newly stabilized ACP v1 features that are missing or incomplete in grok-cli.

subtasks.title: Add structured Model Config Option Category
Implement Session Info Update (titles, status, metadata)

tasks.title: ACP v1 + v2 Upgrade Roadmap for Grok-CLI
tasks.details: Master plan to bring Grok-CLI up to date with the latest stabilized ACP features (v1) and prepare for the new unstable v2 / MCP-over-ACP capabilities.

subtasks.title: ACP v1 Core (stable) – implement missing methods

tasks.title: ACP v1 Feature Additions – Cancellation Polish & Testing
tasks.details: Polish the cancellation implementation and add a small test so we know it actually stops a running prompt.

subtasks.title: Add a unit test that verifies cancel aborts a prompt

tasks.title: Implement AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md style rule loading
tasks.description: Add support for loading agent rules from AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md and similar files with directory walking from repo root to CWD. Also support global rules in ~/.grok/.
tasks.details: Implementation complete. New agent_rules.rs + integration into ContextEngine. Supports AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, directory walking, global ~/.grok/ rules, and legacy fallback.
tasks.testStrategy: Test loading rules from multiple directories, verify override order, check prompt injection

tasks.title: Implement Session-only Rules
tasks.description: Add support for temporary, in-memory session-only rules that can be added via slash commands without touching files.
tasks.details:
Session-only rules fully implemented:
- New SessionRules struct
- /rule add, /rule remove, /rules, /rule clear commands
- Integrated into slash command parser + ACP
- Rules injected via ContextEngine
- Stored only in current session

tasks.title: Add Picture/Image (Vision) Support to grok-cli
tasks.description: Implement image input support via both /image command and direct prompts. Support local files + URLs. Auto-switch to vision model. Images are ephemeral (no session persistence).
tasks.details:
Requirements:
- Support /image <path|url> [prompt]
- Detect image references directly in prompts
- Auto-switch to vision-capable model
- Local files + URLs supported
- No image storage in sessions
- Use existing base64 dependency
tasks.testStrategy: Manual testing with local images and URLs + vision model responses

subtasks.title: Add TUI feedback for attached images

tasks.title: Add /init command - Project initialization / scaffolding
tasks.description: Add a new /init slash command that creates a .grok/ folder in the current project and copies the system-level configuration files (config.toml, agents, etc.) so users can customize them per-project.
tasks.details: Implemented in src/tools/init.rs. Properly separates system-only folders (sessions, logs, audit, memory, etc.) from project-customizable ones (config.toml, agents/, skills/). Added overwrite protection and gitignore handling.
tasks.testStrategy: Test in a clean directory and in a directory that already has .grok/

tasks.title: Update model defaults and lists to lead with grok-4 (crates.io grok_api caveat)
tasks.description: The user wants the CLI to present 'grok-4' as the primary/recommended model. Note: the grok_api crate (from crates.io) may need updating first before dynamic /v1/models or new model names can be fully trusted. We keep curated static lists for now. Break changes into small steps.
tasks.details: User wants smaller incremental jobs to avoid max tool loop. Focus on one small edit + cargo check per step. grok_api crates.io note: we cannot rely on dynamic model list until grok_api crate is updated. Using static lists.

subtasks.title: Update ACP capabilities and session default model
Update slash commands model list and hints
Clean up stale comments and specific grok-4.3/grok-4.5 references
Update tests that assert exact old defaults
Verify with cargo check after each small change

tasks.title: Small task: Fix remaining 'grok-4.5' default test assert in config/mod.rs
tasks.description: One tiny change: update the test that still expects 'grok-4.5' as default_model to check for 'grok-4' prefix instead. Then cargo check.

tasks.title: Small task: Update stale comments mentioning grok-4.3 as primary model (config + acp)
tasks.description: Replace comments like 'grok-4.3 supports...' with 'grok-4.x models support...' in non-test code. Keep specific 1M context tests as-is. One file at a time.

tasks.title: Small task: Update example/hint strings that still suggest grok-4.3 as example default
tasks.description: In docs, help text, cli/app.rs comments, etc. Lead with grok-4. Do one file.

tasks.title: Small task: Add note about grok_api crates.io dependency for model list
tasks.description: Document in relevant place (e.g. slash_commands or a README note) that dynamic model discovery depends on grok_api crate updates.
